title: Gold miners' bull run squeezed as prices plummet and energy costs soar
summary: Gold's recent move lower has second-order effects for the prospects of the firms that dig the metal out of the ground.

title: Goldman Sachs now reckons that oil could take out the 2008 record of $147
summary: After all, records are made to be broken

title: Can India Afford to Quit Coal?
summary: India is the world’s biggest case study for decarbonization, with a coal-reliant grid and 1.4 million people who depend on it. The world’s most populous country has an outsized impact on global climate goals, as well as outsized hurdles on the way to getting there. The scale of the challenge would …

title: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
summary: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, as handbags lose appeal.

title: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.
